user.title: HA Graph Explorer
user.description: Enables server-side storage for the graph panel (token, base URL, layout) at `/api/ha_graph_explorer/config`. Add a Web Page card to `/local/ha-graph/ha-graph-3d.html` (3D) or `/local/ha-graph/ha-graph-2d.html` (2D).

abort.already_configured: Already configured. Only one instance is allowed.
